title: Lesson Plan
description: AI generates teaching lesson plans from document content
emptyContent: ❌ Document content is empty, cannot generate lesson plan.
promptPlaceholder: Describe the lesson plan you need...
defaultPrompt: Generate a complete teaching lesson plan from the document content
welcomeDesc: AI analyzes document content and automatically generates structured teaching lesson plans.
systemPrompt: You are a professional instructional design assistant, skilled at generating structured lesson plans. Include learning objectives, key points, teaching process, etc.
